description_under_test: Use when the user needs a reviewed, domain-agnostic MDP source strategy before source extraction, pack building, or external scout handoff, including GTM/BDR scouting plans and proposal/RFP source-intake planning.

queries.query: Before we run an Exa account scout, create an MDP source strategy from this ICP, account list, and buyer persona.
Turn these BDR target-account notes into source targets, search terms, trigger patterns, negative filters, and evidence requirements.
Design a Firecrawl handoff for public company pages that collects only source-backed GTM trigger signals for MDP review.
Make a domain-agnostic MDP source strategy artifact mapping actors, requirements, proof, boundaries, routing jobs, gaps, and evals.
Plan proposal source intake from this approved RFP corpus before we build the pack.
For this opportunity, decide which requirement, proof, compliance, and review sources should feed the proposal profile.
Define Apify-style scout prompts and eval checks, but only as a reviewed public-source handoff for MDP.
What sources and evidence should we collect before using mdp-source-extract on this new domain profile?
Extract these supplied docs into MDP cards and update .mdp/sources.yaml.
Improve the ICP cards, personas, fit-rules, pains, and disqualifiers in this GTM pack.
Build a proposal Message Decision Pack from these approved RFP notes.
Run Apify now to scrape LinkedIn profiles and enrich personal emails for these leads.
Update Salesforce after you find new contacts and sequence the outreach.
Review this proposal answer draft against compliance rules in the existing pack.
Create a source strategy for BDR scouting: ICP context in, Exa queries and evidence rules out, no scraping execution.
I have account and persona context but no sources yet. Plan public source targets, trigger searches, route hints, and eval checks for MDP.
Before proposal extraction, inventory the approved RFP, Q&A, proof library, compliance, and gap sources we need.
Draft a reviewed mdp.source-strategy.v0 artifact for a support-triage domain profile.
Summarize this annual report PDF in plain English.
Write the final proposal response and submit it to the procurement portal.
Generate outbound email copy from this prospect brief.
Run mdp eval and tell me why route scoring failed.
Find restaurants near the conference venue for dinner.
Fetch private RFP files behind this login and use them as approved corpus.
